commentaries.author: Gaius Marius Victorinus
commentaries.content: If it is shameful even to speak of these things in secret, it is fairly plain that these people were doing wicked things, things too depraved even to talk about. .

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: But what do we understand "the sense of the flesh "and "the life of the flesh "(to mean), except whatever "it shames (one) to pronounce? "
